desc: Angular Example App is a beginner-friendly, production-ready web application built with Angular 21. It serves as a real-world example showcasing core Angular f…
descFull: Angular Example App is a beginner-friendly, production-ready web application built with Angular 21. It serves as a real-world example showcasing core Angular features such as CRUD operations, authentication, i18n, lazy loading, and signals.
